//: Rust Code Studio — starter .claude/settings.json for a large multi-crate workspace. Copy to your repo root (and/or per-crate dir), trim to taste. See docs/large-workspace.md. Comments (keys starting with //) are not valid settings — delete them before use.
//permissions: Block opening checked-in generated/vendored code. (.gitignore already keeps target/ out of search; these stop Claude OPENING such files.)

permissions.//additionalDirectories: Only when you start Claude from a single crate and need sibling crates. Relative to the start dir. Remove if you start from the workspace root.

//worktree: Sparse-checkout only the crates a task/subagent needs; symlink target/ so worktrees don't duplicate it. Paths are repo-root-relative. Include .claude.
